zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Emich II von Kyrburg於大約1089年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀吉爾吉爾卡包格時，他的父親Emich Ier von Kyrburg31歲，母親Mrs Emich Ier von Kyrburg26歲。他和Maria Sophia Von Flonheim至少有2個兒子。他去世於1136年之後。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Emich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eric
meanings: Of Old Norse origin, from ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’ ( see Eirik ). It was introduced into Britain by Scandinavian settlers before the Norman Conquest. As a modern given name, it was revived in the mid 19th century and has remained in use since.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Emich II von Kyrburg was born about 1089, in Kyrburg, Kirn, Kirn, Kreuznach, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Emich Ier von Kyrburg, was 31 and his mother, Mrs Emich Ier von Kyrburg, was 26. He had at least 2 sons with Maria Sophia Von Flonheim. He died after 1136.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Emich II von Kyrburg est né environ 1089, à Kyrburg, Kirn, Kirn, Kreuznach, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Emich Ier von Kyrburg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs Emich Ier von Kyrburg, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Maria Sophia Von Flonheim. Il est décédé après 1136.

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Emich II von Kyrburg(이)가 대략 1089년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레우즈나치 커 커 키르버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Emich Ier von Kyrburg(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Emich Ier von Kyrburg(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Maria Sophia Von Flonheim(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1136년 이후 사망했다.
